chunks.text: ORDER SHEET I N T HE HI G H CO U R T O F S I N DH B E N C H AT S U K K U R C. P No. D – 943 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 07-10-2025 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate for Respondents 4to6 Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh >>>>>><<<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner files a statement along with judgment dated 10-07-2025 passed by Honourable Supreme Court of Pakistan in Civil Petition No.616-K of 2025, which is taken on record and copy thereof is provided to learned AAG. The respondents are directed to decide the matter afresh in the light of aforementioned judgment of Honourable Supreme Court of Pakistan and furnish such report within thirty days, before Additional Registrar of this Court. Under the circumstances, instant Petition is disposed of. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
